services.email module¶

Email Service Module¶

This module handles sending emails for the application using the fastapi_mail library. It supports sending verification emails for new registrations and password reset links.

async services.email.send_email(email: str, username: str, host: str)[source]¶

Sends an email to verify the user’s email address during registration.

Generates a verification token and renders the email_template.html template.

Parameters:

  • email (str) – The recipient’s email address.

  • username (str) – The username to display in the email body.

  • host (str) – The base URL of the application (e.g., http://localhost:8000).

Raises:

Exception – Logs any error that occurs during the email sending process.

Returns:

None

async services.email.send_reset_password_email(email: str, username: str, host: str, reset_token: str)[source]¶

Sends an email with a password reset link.

Renders the password_reset.html template with a unique reset token.

Parameters:

  • email (str) – The recipient’s email address.

  • username (str) – The username of the account owner.

  • host (str) – The base URL of the application.

  • reset_token (str) – The secure token generated for password recovery.

Returns:

None
